title: MissingItem
description: A single gap surfaced by the context-scoring engine: something a well-formed domain SHOULD have but doesn't yet. Rendered as an actionable to-do in the onboarding / score UI.

label.description: Human-readable description of what is missing, e.g. 'No goals defined in manifest.json'.

severity.description: How much this gap hurts the score. critical = score-capping; warn = meaningful penalty; info = nice-to-have.

kind.description: Category of the gap, used by the UI to group and to deep-link the fix.
